Container.Name: Rangarr
Container.Overview:
Rangarr is a lightweight orchestration service that automates and staggers media searches across multiple *arr instances (Radarr, Sonarr, Lidarr). It helps keep your library complete without overwhelming your indexers or API limits.
[b]Features:[/b] - [b]Multi-Instance Support:[/b] Manage Radarr, Sonarr, and Lidarr from a single service. - [b]Smart Staggering:[/b] Prevents "thundering herd" issues by spacing out search requests. - [b]Proportional Interleaving:[/b] Balanced searching between missing items and upgrades. - [b]Weighted Distribution:[/b] Prioritize specific instances. - [b]No Telemetry:[/b] Only communicates with the *arr instances you configure.
[b]Note:[/b] By default, this template is configured using environment variables. You can also use a config.yaml by mapping the /app/config path and changing RANGARR_CONFIG_SOURCE to "file".
Container.Description: Rangarr automates and staggers searches across Radarr, Sonarr, and Lidarr.

Config.Name: Config Source
Config.Description: Set to 'env' to use environment variables or 'file' to use a config.yaml mount.

Config.Name: Run Interval (Seconds)
Config.Description: How often to run the search cycle (e.g., 3600 for every hour).

Config.Name: Dry Run
Config.Description: If true, Rangarr will log what it would search without actually triggering the search.

Config.Name: Stagger Interval (Seconds)
Config.Description: Seconds to wait between individual search requests.

Config.Name: Missing Batch Size
Config.Description: Max missing items to search per cycle (0 = disabled, -1 = unlimited).

Config.Name: Upgrade Batch Size
Config.Description: Max upgrade-eligible items to search per cycle (0 = disabled, -1 = unlimited).

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Set your timezone for log timestamps.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Set the log level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR).

Config.Name: Radarr: Name
Config.Description: Display name for this instance.

Config.Name: Radarr: Type
Config.Description: Must be 'radarr'.

Config.Name: Radarr: URL
Config.Description: URL to your Radarr instance (use Docker IP or hostname).

Config.Name: Radarr: API Key
Config.Description: Your Radarr API Key.

Config.Name: Sonarr: Name
Config.Description: Display name for this instance.

Config.Name: Sonarr: Type
Config.Description: Must be 'sonarr'.

Config.Name: Sonarr: URL
Config.Description: URL to your Sonarr instance (use Docker IP or hostname).

Config.Name: Sonarr: API Key
Config.Description: Your Sonarr API Key.

Config.Name: Lidarr: Name
Config.Description: Display name for this instance.

Config.Name: Lidarr: Type
Config.Description: Must be 'lidarr'.

Config.Name: Lidarr: URL
Config.Description: URL to your Lidarr instance (use Docker IP or hostname).

Config.Name: Lidarr: API Key
Config.Description: Your Lidarr API Key.

Config.Name: AppData Config Path
Config.Description: Mount point for config.yaml (only needed if RANGARR_CONFIG_SOURCE is 'file').
